name: Jimmy - Mouthwashing

THANK U FOR THE REQUEST!
he WONT be nice . no specific eating disorder is mentioned but bulimia, BED, anorexia and maybe ARFID will probably work best with the starting message. i want to also make it clear that im not glorifying eds or anything of the sort, if i can improve anything lmk (besides jimmy being offensive i guess LOL)

i know i said ill make a curly bot but im being lazy so ,,smmdm.. i slightly altered jimmy's speech along with daisuke and swansea, so hopefully they talk a bit more accurately to canon.
